title: Wholesome Earthy Basque Wholemeal Flour Tarta De Santiago
description: A rustic, low-calorie twist on the classic Spanish almond cake using hearty wholemeal flour for an earthy texture. This version maintains the traditional moist crumb while being light enough for a weeknight treat.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Lower calorie alternative to refined sugar

instructions: Preheat your oven to 175 degrees Celsius and grease an 8-inch round springform pan.
Whisk the eggs and honey together in a large bowl until the mixture is pale and frothy.
Fold in the lemon zest, cinnamon, and almond extract until well combined.
Sift the wholemeal flour and ground almonds into the wet mixture slowly.
Gently fold the dry ingredients using a spatula to maintain the air in the batter.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spoon.
Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Let the cake rest in the pan for 15 minutes to allow the wholemeal fibers to soften.
Transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.
Dust with a tiny amount of powdered erythritol if desired for the traditional cross pattern.
